title: Types of Visualizations
description: A collection of data visualization projects exploring nutrition economics and critical analysis of misleading data presentation in journalism.

title: South America Climate Change
description: An interactive data visualization tracking surface temperature changes across South American countries from 1961 to 2024.

title: Amazon Reviews as Economic Indicators
description: Using Amazon reviews data to analyze consumer sentiment and its correlation with economic indicators such as GDP.

title: Pedal Patrol
description: Using D3 and MapBox to create an interactive map that visualizes bike traffic patterns in Boston, MA.

title: Lunar Crater
description: An interactive, scroll-driven data story visualizing the formation and long-term evolution of impact craters across the Moon's mare regions — from the earliest bombardment to the present day.

title: Melanoma-Classification-via-CNN-Soft-Ensemble
description: A deep learning pipeline for melanoma classification using transfer learning models (ResNet50 and EfficientNet), with cross-dataset validation to evaluate generalization and robustness under domain shift.

title: Flavors, Features, and Feedback: A Data Science Approach to Recipe Ratings
description: This project uses Food.com recipe data—including nutritional information, user reviews, and ratings—to build a model that predicts recipe ratings from review text while analyzing how factors like calorie content influence perceived enjoyment and the trade-off between health and taste.

title: Data Science Salary Analysis Dashboard
description: This project showcases an interactive analysis dashboard I developed using Excel, featuring insights drawn from salary datasets across Data Science job postings.
